title: Toaster Support
description: A lightweight optimization-only modpack that aims to save your PC from doubling as a toaster!
body:
### 🚧 Status note:

Thanks for taking a look! I don't recommend using the modpack in its current state. It wasn't very well made, and **some versions will crash instantly** (I didn't really know what I was doing at the time).

That said, I'm working on an improved remake. Feel free to check back soon!
